scripts.lint: bun build tools/effect-oxlint.plugin.ts --target=node --outfile tools/effect-oxlint.plugin.mjs && bun run --cwd packages/oxlint-plugin-foldkit build && oxlint .
scripts.lint:fix: bun build tools/effect-oxlint.plugin.ts --target=node --outfile tools/effect-oxlint.plugin.mjs && bun run --cwd packages/oxlint-plugin-foldkit build && oxlint . --fix
